title: verbascum × kayseriense
intro: Verbascum × kayseriense, also known as Turkish mullein or Kayseri mullein, is a sterile hybrid plant that results from the cross between Verbascum phoeniceum and Verbascum lychnitis, both belonging to the mullein family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Verbascum × kayseriense include its ability to soothe sore throats, calm skin irritations, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
